title: Global Partnership for Action on Gender-Based Online Harassment and Abuse on non-consensual intimate images (NCII)
body: "The Global Partnership for Action on Gender-Based Online Harassment and Abuse (Global Partnership) brings together countries, including the UK, with support from a multi-disciplinary advisory group. It works to prioritise, understand, prevent, and address technology-facilitated gender-based violence (TFGBV).   The governments of Australia (eSafety Commissioner), Canada, Chile, Finland, France, Iceland, Montenegro, Republic of Korea, Spain, Sweden and the United Kingdom signed this joint statement.   "
